appliedBodyType.title: appliedBodyType
appliedBodyType.description: The body type filter that was applied. Returns ALL if no filter was used.

message.title: message
message.description: Status message indicating success or error.

vehicleList.title: vehicleList
vehicleList.description:
All vehicles in pipe-delimited format: 
1|VehicleName|VehicleId,2|VehicleName|VehicleId.
Parse by splitting on comma then pipe.
Display ONLY position 1 (number) and position 2 
(vehicle name) to the user as a clean numbered list.
DO NOT show VehicleId, for example,
DO NOT show like 1|Honda City ZX CVT|1Pqak00000010u8CAA,2|Hyundai Creta SX(O)|1Pqak00000010u2CAA,3|Maruti Suzuki Swift ZXi|1Pqak00000010u1CAA,4|Toyota Innova Hycross ZX(O)|1Pqak00000010u7CAA

DO SHOW like 1|Honda City ZX CVT
2|Hyundai Creta SX(O)
3|Maruti Suzuki Swift ZXi
4|Toyota Innova Hycross ZX(O)
SHOW Data in new lines

Position 3 is vehicleDefinitionId — store it 
silently and NEVER show it to the user.
